label: 家庭欢乐版
texture_guidance: 彩色气球、纸质三角旗、圆点波点、卡通贴纸装饰、木质餐盘、暖色格纹桌布、儿童涂鸦线条。
scene_prompt: FAMILY JOY DINING POSTER. light: bright cheerful overhead natural light mixed with warm indoor ambient, soft even fill with no harsh shadows, friendly and inviting sunny atmosphere. material: colorful party bunting flags, round balloons in primary colors, polka dot tablecloth or napkins, wooden serving boards, cartoon sticker decorations, crayon doodle accents, confetti scattered, friendly plate arrangements. color: sunshine yellow #FFD93D, cherry red #FF6B6B, sky blue #74B9FF, grass green #6BCB77, warm orange #FFA94D, soft white #FFFCF0. composition: energetic but organized layout; multiple food items arranged in a playful scattered pattern suggesting abundance and choice; bold bubbly headline text centered or slightly upper; party decoration elements (bunting, balloons) framing the top and sides; the TOP-LEFT CORNER (upper 15% height, left 30% width) reserved for brand logo — keep free of text and busy elements, soft solid color or gentle bunting edge is fine. avoid: no dark moody lighting, no alcohol/bar imagery, no minimalist cold aesthetics, no luxury premium restraint, no nightlife neon, no single-item hero composition, no spicy aggressive red-black.
design_lessons: 家庭欢乐感的营造靠高饱和度多色搭配和派对道具元素。食物要展现分量感和多样性（而非单品精致），传递'一家人吃得开心'的情绪。泡泡字体增加童趣亲和力。
